notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Brooks Lee singles on a ground ball to shortstop Trevor Story. Ryan Jeffers scores. Victor Caratini scores. Matt Wallner to 2nd. Throwing error by shortstop Trevor Story.

notableEvents.label: Marcelo Mayer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Marcelo Mayer grounds into a double play, pitcher Bailey Ober to shortstop Brooks Lee to first baseman Victor Caratini. Wilyer Abreu to 3rd. Trevor Story out at 2nd. Marcelo Mayer out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andruw Monasterio pinch-hit

notableEvents.detail: Isiah Kiner-Falefa flies out to right fielder Matt Wallner.
